subject: [PATCH v2 1/6] fuse: create fuse_dev on /dev/fuse open instead of mount

reviews.author: Mark Brown
reviews.summary: Mentioned that the patch is corrupted due to word wrapping and tab conversion, but stated it works as intended.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Apr 22, 2026 at 09:54:10AM -0700, Joanne Koong wrote:
> On Wed, Apr 22, 2026 at 2:04 AM Miklos Szeredi <mszeredi@redhat.com> wrote:

> From e434521edf44596239a07838a1a8b37c5f0464cb Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
> From: Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>
> Date: Wed, 22 Apr 2026 09:31:23 -0700
> Subject: [PATCH] fuse: don't block in fuse_get_dev() for non-sync_init case
> 
> Commit a8dd5f1b73bc ("fuse: create fuse_dev on /dev/fuse open instead of
> mount") changed behavior so that fuse_get_dev() now unconditionally
> blocks waiting for a connection, even in the case where sync_init was
> not set. Previously, non-sync_init opens returned -EPERM immediately.

Just a heads up that the patch is corrupted - it's word wrapped and has
tabs converted to spaces at least.  It does the job though:

Tested-by: Mark Brown <broonie@kernel.org>

2026-04-22.patch_summary: Joanne Koong's patch reverts the change made in commit a8dd5f1b73bc to fuse_get_dev() behavior, restoring the previous behavior of returning -EPERM for non-sync_init cases.

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: Applied the patch without further comment.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, 22 Apr 2026 at 19:00, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:

> From e434521edf44596239a07838a1a8b37c5f0464cb Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
> From: Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>
> Date: Wed, 22 Apr 2026 09:31:23 -0700
> Subject: [PATCH] fuse: don't block in fuse_get_dev() for non-sync_init case
>
> Commit a8dd5f1b73bc ("fuse: create fuse_dev on /dev/fuse open instead of
> mount") changed behavior so that fuse_get_dev() now unconditionally
> blocks waiting for a connection, even in the case where sync_init was
> not set. Previously, non-sync_init opens returned -EPERM immediately.
>
> Restore the previous behavior of returning -EPERM.
>
> Fixes: a8dd5f1b73bc ("fuse: create fuse_dev on /dev/fuse open instead of mount")
> Reported-by: Mark Brown <broonie@kernel.org>
> Cc: <stable@vger.kernel.org>
> Signed-off-by: Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>

Applied, thanks.

Miklos

2026-04-23.patch_summary: Joanne Koong's patch reverts the change made in commit a8dd5f1b73bc to fuse_get_dev() behavior, restoring the previous behavior of returning -EPERM for non-sync_init cases.
